flow_points: India scored 67/1 in the Powerplay at an RR of 11.17.
A high-scoring finish by India in Death Overs (RR 15.2) shifted momentum.
SV Samson anchored India's innings, contributing 35.2% of the team's runs.
England's Powerplay yielded 68 runs but at the cost of 3 wickets, failing to build a stable foundation.
JG Bethell anchored England's chase with 105(53), contributing 42.7% of their total runs.
However, several Indian bowlers, including CV Varun (economy 16.0) and S Dube (22.0), had expensive outings.
England maintained a high-scoring finish in Death Overs (RR 12.2).
HH Pandya sustained defensive pressure for India with an impact score of 83.71.
England struggled under extreme chase pressure (Index 81.0), leading to a late-innings collapse.
